abilities.description: When you mark your hands or weapon with an intricate blood rune, roll +iron. On a strong hit, the rune thirsts for fresh blood. One time only, when you make a move to inflict harm, reroll any dice and mark two progress on a hit. Then, for each progress marked, take +1 and allocate it as +health or *momentum. On a weak hit, as above, but the nanites destabilize and this asset counts as an impact until the rune's thirst is quenched.
As above, and you may also touch an ally or companion and let them take any amount of points as +health or +momentum.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.2051538f0c9d5d27]{Heal} by invoking the blood rune's pattern to draw out poisons and mend wounds, reroll any dice but count a weak hit as a miss as the ritual takes its toll.
